language.note: locales live under playbooks/{lang}/ and templates/{lang}/; chosen in SETUP, stored in profile/.locale

role.description: The single agent the user launches. Reads playbooks on demand. Drafts only; never auto-acts.

tool.desc: Web search for market-sensing and company research. API-only, never scrape.

fallback.rule: on quota-exhaustion or error: tavily -> deepseek-websearch-mcp; else report to user, never scrape

tool.desc: Fetch raw repo files (green-path setup) and public pages for research. Read-only.
tool.rule: No auth tricks; respect ToS; never submit forms.
Never write user data into the repo. Portable across tools.

tool.desc: Scores an opportunity vs profile/positioning.md section 12 before any suggested reply.

constraints.c: Human-in-the-loop: no auto-apply / post / email / connect / publish.
No personal data or secrets in the repo.
Never infer positioning; always ask (Ritual A).

status.done: P0–P5 (playbooks x2 locales, templates, tooling, market-config, claude-code-adapter, smoke test) + voice-ingestion (Ritual A section 1b + VOICE.md) + anti-slop reference (stop-slop) in brand-engine; EN-default
status.next: v1 complete — publish repo, fill the REPO_URL placeholder, then real-user dogfood
